LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Buck.label: .410 Bore shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Buck.description: Low caliber shotgun shell. Its small diameter allows it to be fired from many of the same firearms as the .45 Colt cartridge.
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Slug.label: .410 Bore shell (Slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Slug.description: Low caliber shotgun shell. Its small diameter allows it to be fired from many of the same firearms as the .45 Colt cartridge.
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Beanbag.label: .410 Bore shell (Bean)
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_Beanbag.description: Low caliber shotgun shell. Its small diameter allows it to be fired from many of the same firearms as the .45 Colt cartridge.
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_ElectroSlug.label: .410 Bore shell (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_410Bore_ElectroSlug.description: Low caliber shotgun shell. Its small diameter allows it to be fired from many of the same firearms as the .45 Colt cartridge.
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_Buck.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_Slug.label: shotgun slug
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_Beanbag.label: beanbag
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_ElectroSlug.label: EMP slug
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_Buck_SB.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_410Bore_Slug_SB.label: shotgun slug
